name: Ido the Supreme Magical Force
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>イド
desc: You cannot Summon or Normal Set monsters. You can only control 1 "Ido the Supreme Magical Force". Once per turn, during the Standby Phase of the next turn after this card was destroyed by card effect and sent to the GY: Special Summon this card from the GY, and if you do, destroy all other monsters you control.
mnst_eff: You cannot Summon or Normal Set monsters. You can only control 1 "Ido the Supreme Magical Force". Once per turn, during the Standby Phase of the next turn after this card was destroyed by card effect and sent to the GY: Special Summon this card from the GY, and if you do, destroy all other monsters you control.
eff: You cannot Summon or Normal Set monsters. You can only control 1 "Ido the Supreme Magical Force". Once per turn, during the Standby Phase of the next turn after this card was destroyed by card effect and sent to the GY: Special Summon this card from the GY, and if you do, destroy all other monsters you control.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
